steps.title: Close the dash pair
steps.content: The sentence opens an em-dash interruption after "Interpol" to define the organization. That interruption must be closed before "in 1971" returns to the main sentence.

steps.title: Reject mismatched punctuation
steps.content: A uses a comma, C uses no closing punctuation, and D uses a colon; none matches the opening dash. The closing punctuation must be another em dash. The answer is B.
